case_number: Miscellaneous is given they would not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.462 of 2023 Decagon Pakistan (Private) Limited. Versus Zarmina Darius Dastur & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal (As office objections No.2,4,9,15,19 & 20 not complied with since 29.11.2023) Dated: 05.04.2024 Mr. Osman Hadi along with Mr. Abdur Raafae Soori for appellant. Mr. Shahan Karimi for respondents No.5 and 6 on statutory notice. -.-.- After some deliberation and hearing, it is agreed that in this appeal if some directions for the disposal of the main case i.e. Judicial Company Miscellaneous is given they would not oppose disposal of this appeal. Accordingly, with the consent of both the learned counsel in attendance we dispose of this appeal with the understanding that the Judicial Company Miscellaneous No.19 of 2023 be disposed of after hearing the parties/counsel within six weeks’ time after Eid holidays. Judge Judge
